items.title: Unplayable
items.summary:
I really wanted to like this game, but unfortunately I can’t even get passed the login page. It keeps saying I am under the age requirement no matter what login option I choose (I am 25) and everything I’ve seen for how to fix it requires going to settings, account, and contact support. There is no account or contact support option in settings. I imagine there is when you’re actually able to get INTO the game. 
I’ve tried restarting the game 15 times (yes, actually. I started counting after a few times of trying to get it) in an attempt to get in. 
If this gets resolved, I will come back to edit this review, but until then it will remain one star for being literally unusable.
items.author: yeechuul
